relationships.context: V believes portfolio theory applies to careers just as it does to finance
V's dietary metaphor is an application of portfolio theory to job seeking
Optimal career progression requires correct ratio between the two
High-risk opportunities capitalize on convexity for asymmetric returns
Pipeline should have specific percentage allocations implementing the balance
This is a core Careerspan domain position on how to approach job seeking
